titleStmt.title: SII 28.211: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 211. (A.R. No. 366 of 1913.)

summary.p: CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Naṭarāja temple, west gōpuram, left of entrance.

Registers a royal order conveyed through Kāliṅgarāyaṉ to be executed by different local authorities connected with the temple in respect of a grant of land for providing food offerings during sandhi at the waking up time (tiruppaḷḷi-yeḻichchi) as also during sundara-pāṇḍiyan-sandhi and [Ellān]-talaiyāṉaperumāḷ-sandhi for God Kulōttuṅga-chōḷa-Viṉāyaka-ppiḷḷaiyār (set up) on the southern side of tiru-nilai-yeḻu-gōpuram of Irājākkaḷ-tambirāṉ-tirumāḷikai.
Refers to some land received as gurudakshiṇai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaṉ kkittikku mel komāṟapaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccavattikaḷ śrīkulacekara
ṭu 2 ya tu kāliṅkarāyaṉ Olai teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyarum kulacekara brahmārāyarum
brahmārāyarum ṇṭiya brahmārāyarum pañcavaṉ brahmārāyarum jayatuṅka pallavaraiyarum Eṉātiyaraiyarum
tillaiampalap pallavaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvara kaṇkāṇi ce
yvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tiru
māḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum paṇṭārappottaka muṭaiyārkaḷum tillai nāyakaṉ perumpaṇṭārattāru
m tirumaṭappaḷḷi paṇṭārattārum tirukkākkaḷḷip paṇṭārattārum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭu tantatāvatu I

rācākkaḷ tampirāṉ tirumāḷikai ttirumāḷikaiyil tirunilaiyeḻukopurat tiruvācaṟ teṉpakkattu Eḻun
taruḷi Iruntu pūcai koṇṭaruḷik kulottuṅkacoḻa viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyār tiruppaḷḷiyeḻuccik kāla
ttup paruppupoṉakam Amutu ceytaruḷac ciṟukālaic cantit tirumantirappoṉakattu pālkkaḷi Amutu cey
taruḷavum cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉ cantiyilum Ellāntalaiyāṉa perumāḷ cantiyillum muttatarattu tiruppaṇṇi
yāram Amutu ceytaruḷavum Iva ntakkaṭṭukku Uṭalāka mutaliyār tirumañcaṇam Aḻakiyār ti
ruppaṇikāppuṟa tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Ivar cantāṉa maṭappuṟamāṉa nilattum Ivar cantāṉattu
tum vilaikoṇṭum Uṭaiyāriṉ nilattuviṭṭa tirucciṟṟampala
teṉṉavataraiyaṉ pakkal gurudakṣiṇaiyāka peṟṟu U�Continuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
